title: ajuga laevigata
intro: Ajuga laevigata, also known as smooth bugle or blue bugle, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ajuga laevigata include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in traditional remedies for its purported ability to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and digestive issues.
